html:
Exclusive to:  

For the filter in Don't Starve Together, see Magic Filter.
Tab Icon
“"I put some gems and black stuff together and got this."”

–Wilson

Magic items and structures can be obtained from Crafting, in the Magic Tab with the red skull icon on the left-hand side. The Prestihatitator is prototyped from the Science Machine. The Meat Effigy, Pan Flute, One-man Band, Night Light, Life Giving Amulet, Chilled Amulet, Ice Staff and Shadow Manipulator are prototyped from the Prestihatitator, while the Dark Sword, Night Armor, Bat Bat, Belt of Hunger, Nightmare Amulet, Fire Staff, Telelocator Staff and Telelocator Focus are prototyped from the Shadow Manipulator.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, the player can craft the Old Bell in the Magic Tab.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Prestihatitator has been replaced by the Piratihatitator. Dripple Pipes were also added to the Magic Tab. In a Shipwrecked compatible Reign of Giants or base game world, the Seaworthy is also found in this tab.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Prestihatitator has been replaced by the Hogus Porkusator. Pugalisk Wands, Root Trunks, Vortex Cloaks and Living Artifacts are also available to craft in the Magic Tab. In a Hamlet compatible Shipwrecked, Reign of Giants or base game world, the Skyworthy is also found in this tab.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be crafted in the Magic Tab:

  • Meat Effigy
  • Prestihatitator
  • Shadow Manipulator
  • Pan Flute
  • One-man Band
  • Night Light
  • Dark Sword
  • Night Armor
  • Bat Bat
  • Belt of Hunger
  • Life Giving Amulet
  • Chilled Amulet
  • Nightmare Amulet
  • Fire Staff
  • Ice Staff
  • Telelocator Staff
  • Telelocator Focus
  • Old Bell
  • Piratihatitator
  • Dripple Pipes
  • Seaworthy
    only on worlds linked to
  • Hogus Porkusator
  • Pugalisk Wand
  • Root Trunk
  • Vortex Cloak
  • Living Artifact
  • Skyworthy
    only on worlds linked to

Trivia

Old Magic Tab Icon.
  • The Magic Tab icon is available for use on Steam as an uncommon chat emoticon.
  • The Magic Tab icon used to be an inverted pentacle, but it was changed to a red skull. The reason for this change is unknown.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các vật phẩm và cấu trúc ma thuật có thể thu được từ Chế tạo, trong Thẻ Ma thuật với biểu tượng đầu lâu màu đỏ ở phía bên trái. Prestihatitator được tạo nguyên mẫu từ Máy Khoa học. Bùa Thịt , Sáo Pan , Ban nhạc một người , Ánh sáng ban đêm , Bùa ban sự sống , Bùa ướp lạnh , Gậy băng và Người điều khiển bóng tối được tạo nguyên mẫu từ Máy điều khiển bóng tối , trong khi Hắc kiếm , Giáp đêm , Dơi dơi , Thắt lưng đói khát , Bùa ác mộng , Gậy lửa , Trượng dịch chuyển và Tiêu điểm máy điều khiển bóng tối được tạo nguyên mẫu từ Máy điều khiển bóng tối .

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve|Reign of Giants|Shipwrecked|Hamlet}} {{For|the filter in [[Don't Starve Together]]|Magic Filter}} [[File:Icon Magic.png|right|thumb|Tab Icon]] {{Quote|"I put some gems and black stuff together and got this."|Wilson}} Magic items and structures can be obtained from [[Crafting]], in the '''Magic Tab''' with the red skull icon on the left-hand side. The [[Prestihatitator]] is prototyped from the [[Science Machine]]. The [[Meat Effigy]], [[Pan Flute]], [[One-man Band]], [[Night Light]], [[Life Giving Amulet]], [[Chilled Amulet]], [[Ice Staff]] and [[Shadow Manipulator]] are prototyped from the [[Prestihatitator]], while the [[Dark Sword]], [[Night Armor]], [[Bat Bat]], [[Belt of Hunger]], [[Nightmare Amulet]], [[Fire Staff]], [[Telelocator Staff]] and [[Telelocator Focus]] are prototyped from the [[Shadow Manipulator]]. ==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content== In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, the player can craft the [[Old Bell]] in the Magic Tab. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, the Prestihatitator has been replaced by the [[Piratihatitator]]. [[Dripple Pipes]] were also added to the Magic Tab. In a ''Shipwrecked'' compatible ''Reign of Giants'' or base game world, the [[Seaworthy]] is also found in this tab. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, the Prestihatitator has been replaced by the [[Hogus Porkusator]]. [[Pugalisk Wand]]s, [[Root Trunk]]s, [[Vortex Cloak]]s and [[Living Artifact]]s are also available to craft in the Magic Tab. In a ''Hamlet'' compatible ''Shipwrecked'', ''Reign of Giants ''or''''' '''''base game world, the [[Skyworthy]] is also found in this tab. ==Craftable Items and Structures== The following items and structures can be crafted in the Magic Tab:
